note: Last ~10 received emails per account. Primary is pulled live from the Gmail connector; secondary requires connecting that account.

emails.subject: Your Apple Account information has been updated.
emails.snippet: Your Apple Account information has been updated. Changes to your Apple Account were made on July 22, 2026. If you did not make these changes, review your account.

emails.subject: Verify your email address.
emails.snippet: You recently added jackbuckiingham@gmail.com as an additional email address for your Apple Account. Enter the code below to verify this email address belongs to you.

emails.subject: Get the Support Your Business Needs to Thrive
emails.snippet: Hi Jackson, Forming an LLC can be intimidating, but you don't need to do it alone. We're here to take the stress out of the LLC formation process.

emails.subject: Accept your invitation to join shared calendar: "Jack Buckingham"
emails.snippet: Jack Buckingham (jack.buckingham@lafc.com) has invited you to see all event details on the calendar "Jack Buckingham". Accept the invite to join.

emails.subject: RE: W2 for 2025
emails.snippet: Hello Jack – you can access your W2 through ADP iPay. Please follow the steps below to register your account. Let us know if you have any issues registering.

emails.subject: Missing Football Already? The Top Leagues Are Back!
emails.snippet: The leagues are back for 2026/27. Grab the best seats at the best price before everyone else does.

emails.subject: Re: W-2 Request For 2025
emails.snippet: Hello Jack: Please reach out to Payroll@WMEAgency.com to assist with your query. Thank you. Cara Carroll, WME.

emails.subject: What are Aston Villa going to do with £117m?
emails.snippet: Plus lots of Arsenal rumours, Man United want a France World Cup star.

emails.subject: Fwd: Your trip confirmation (AUS - LAX)
emails.snippet: Begin forwarded message: From American Airlines. Your trip confirmation (AUS - LAX). Here's your itinerary.
